# 2026 Half-Marathon Block - At a Glance

Generated from `weeks/week_YYYY-MM-DD.md` (the source of truth). Edit a week file and re-run `scripts/block_overview.py` to refresh.

Cells show leading mileage plus a short tag (`LR` long run, `HMP` half-marathon pace, `str` strength, `thr` threshold, `strd` strides, `ez` easy). **Bold** marks SOS days.
